description: Jelou provides an AI-powered video and meeting assistance platform that helps teams transcribe, summarize, and analyze conversations.

build_patterns.name: Agentic Architectures

Crea, lanza y gestiona Agentes de IA que no solo responden, sino que también verifican identidades, procesan pagos, firman contratos y automatizan flujos de trabajo empresariales.
La plataforma para construir agentes AI en Whatsapp.
Diseña, entrena y coordina agentes inteligentes para automatizar tus procesos.
Nodos Conoce los bloques que dan forma a cada interacción de tus flujos conversacionales.

build_patterns.description: Jelou.ai enables users to build, deploy, and manage autonomous AI agents that can use tools (e.g., KYC, payments, signature) and orchestrate complex workflows across conversational channels. The documentation and marketing repeatedly emphasize agent creation, tool integration, and orchestration.

build_patterns.name: Vertical Data Moats
evidence: Descubre cómo ayudamos a las industrias más complejas
Banca, Salud, Comercio, Restaurantes
Accede a herramientas probadas en el mercado para habilitar transacciones InChat
Validamos la identidad de los clientes recopilando, verificando los datos y comprobándolos biométricamente.
build_patterns.description: Jelou.ai targets regulated and complex industries (banking, healthcare, commerce, restaurants) and offers proprietary, industry-specific workflows (e.g., KYC, payments, e-signature), suggesting the use of specialized datasets and domain expertise as a competitive moat.

build_patterns.name: Guardrail-as-LLM
evidence: Seguridad y Guardrails
Seguridad de los datos
Certificación ISO 27001
Sin entrenamiento de datos por terceros
Cero retención de datos por terceros
Datos transaccionales encriptados
build_patterns.description: Jelou.ai emphasizes security, compliance, and guardrails in documentation and marketing, including explicit references to 'Seguridad y Guardrails' in agent guides. While not explicitly mentioning LLM-based guardrails, the focus on compliance and moderation layers suggests such mechanisms are present.

build_patterns.name: Natural-Language-to-Code
evidence: Sin código
Recorre los fundamentos de la plataforma y crea tu primer flujo en minutos.
Skills con AI
Prompting
build_patterns.description: The platform is described as 'no-code' and allows users to create AI agent flows and skills rapidly, likely via natural language or visual interfaces. References to 'Prompting' and 'Skills con AI' suggest natural language is used to define agent behavior, though direct code generation is not explicitly stated.

build_patterns.name: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
evidence: Búsqueda inteligente que encuentra lo que necesitas.
Ofrece una experiencia de compra conversacional que entiende lo que el cliente realmente quiere.
vector search
document retrieval
build_patterns.description: Jelou.ai offers 'Búsqueda inteligente' (smart search) and conversational commerce that understands user intent, implying some retrieval-augmented generation for answering queries or surfacing information. However, explicit mention of embeddings or RAG is absent.

sub_vertical: AI-powered business process automation and conversational commerce

signals: Comprehensive developer documentation available at docs.jelou.ai
API reference and changelog are public
Guides for building AI agents, integrating payments, KYC, and e-signature
Detailed documentation structure (guides, variables, nodes, tools, integrations)
Changelog indicates ongoing development and maintenance
Blog covers technical topics such as security, production AI, and system integration
ISO 27001 and PCI DSS certifications indicate mature security practices
Marketplace for integrations and workflow enhancements
Public status page for system uptime and transparency

unique_findings: Jelou.ai enables end-to-end transactional workflows (KYC, payments, e-signature, credit requests) entirely within WhatsApp and other messaging channels, eliminating the need for external links or apps. This is a significant UX and compliance innovation, as most competitors require users to leave the chat for identity, payment, or signature flows.

The platform offers a no-code 'Brain Studio' for building and deploying AI agents with modular 'nodes' (messages, logic, API, code, datum), supporting rapid composition of complex conversational flows. This composability, paired with native support for variables, memory/context separation, and tool integrations, suggests a flexible architecture optimized for business process automation.

Jelou.ai enforces strict data residency and privacy: they prohibit third-party model training and retention of customer data, and encrypt all transactional data. This is a strong differentiator in regulated industries (finance, health) and signals a custom or tightly controlled AI infrastructure, not just API wrappers.

The platform is certified for ISO 27001 and PCI DSS, and is an official Meta tech/business partner, indicating deep integration with WhatsApp/Messenger APIs and enterprise-grade compliance. This level of certification and partnership is non-trivial and hard to replicate quickly.

Jelou.ai's documentation and guides reveal a focus on 'skills' and 'tools' as first-class objects, reminiscent of advanced agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, OpenAI GPTs), but tailored for low-code business users and direct deployment to high-volume messaging channels.

story_angles.headline: How Jelou Built Agentic AI for WhatsApp—No Cloud Required
story_angles.summary: Jelou's Brain Studio enables businesses to create intelligent agents that operate natively within WhatsApp, bypassing traditional cloud dependencies. Their modular, node-based flow builder and agentic architecture allow for rapid, secure deployment of conversational AI directly where users already are.
evidence: Brain Studio: 'La única plataforma que necesitas para crear agentes IA. Sin código.'
Jelou Brain: 'transforma WhatsApp en una plataforma para apps inteligentes sin necesidad de la nube tradicional.'

story_angles.headline: Jelou’s Vertical Data Moat: Turning WhatsApp Conversations into Proprietary AI Assets
story_angles.summary: By focusing on enterprise workflows inside WhatsApp, Jelou is amassing a unique corpus of conversational, transactional, and biometric data. This vertical integration gives them a defensible data advantage for training and fine-tuning domain-specific AI agents.
evidence: KYC and biometric verification directly in WhatsApp
Payments, legal signatures, and e-commerce flows all captured in-chat

story_angles.headline: Why Jelou Is Betting on WhatsApp as the Next Enterprise OS—Not Standalone Apps
story_angles.summary: While most SaaS companies build standalone web or mobile apps, Jelou is all-in on WhatsApp as the primary interface for business operations. This contrarian bet leverages WhatsApp’s ubiquity and regulatory clarity, even as Meta cracks down on general-purpose chatbots.
evidence: Meta restricted general-purpose chatbots, but Jelou’s platform is unaffected
All core workflows—payments, KYC, signatures—happen inside WhatsApp

story_angles.headline: 10x Faster: Launch AI-Powered Workflows in WhatsApp Without Writing Code
story_angles.summary: Jelou’s no-code Brain Studio lets enterprises deploy complex AI agents and integrations in minutes, not months. By abstracting away infrastructure and code, they enable rapid experimentation and deployment for non-technical teams.
evidence: No-code platform for building agents and workflows
Marketplace of plug-and-play integrations for payments, KYC, and more

anti_patterns.description: Core offering centers on enabling AI agents and workflows within WhatsApp, which is a feature that could be easily absorbed by WhatsApp or similar incumbents. The platform's main value props (payments, KYC, signatures, voice agents) are incremental features rather than a defensible product.
evidence: Marketing highlights payments, KYC, signatures, and voice agents as main features.
These are all extensions of WhatsApp's business API and could be added by WhatsApp directly.
No clear evidence of a broader platform or ecosystem beyond these features.

anti_patterns.description: The technical approach appears to be a thin layer over existing LLM APIs and WhatsApp's business API, with no clear proprietary models or infrastructure. Heavy reliance on prompt engineering and orchestration.
evidence: Tech stack references prompt_engineering but no mention of proprietary LLMs or unique AI infrastructure.
Documentation focuses on orchestrating flows, not on novel model development.
No evidence of unique data assets or model innovation.

anti_patterns.description: There is no clear data advantage, technical differentiation, or defensible moat. The product is easily replicable by competitors with access to WhatsApp's API and LLMs.
evidence: No mention of proprietary datasets, vertical data moats, or exclusive partnerships.
Features (payments, KYC, signatures) are available via third-party APIs.
Competitive position described as 'moat: medium', but no supporting evidence of defensibility.

anti_patterns.description: Marketing language is heavy on AI buzzwords ('La única plataforma que necesitas', 'inteligencia que se convierte en ventas', 'IA en producción'), but documentation and product details do not substantiate unique AI capabilities.
evidence: Claims of being the only platform needed for AI agents.
No technical specifics on how their AI is differentiated.
Documentation focuses on orchestration and workflow, not novel AI.

anti_patterns.description: The product operates in a crowded space (AI agents for messaging platforms) without a clear unique angle or technical differentiation.
evidence: Multiple competitors offer similar WhatsApp automation and AI agent solutions.
No unique features or integrations highlighted.
Positioning is generic and lacks a clear vertical focus.

competitors.name: Yellow.ai
competitors.similarity: Both offer AI-powered conversational agents for enterprises, including WhatsApp automation, voice agents, and workflow automation.
competitors.how_different: Jelou.ai emphasizes secure, in-chat transactions (payments, KYC, e-signature) directly within WhatsApp, with a focus on compliance and no third-party data retention, while Yellow.ai is broader in channel coverage and less focused on financial-grade transactions.

competitors.name: Twilio (Twilio Flex, Twilio Conversations)
competitors.similarity: Both provide platforms to build conversational workflows and deploy agents across messaging channels like WhatsApp.
competitors.how_different: Jelou.ai offers no-code agent creation, native in-chat payments, KYC, and e-signature, specifically optimized for WhatsApp and regulated industries, whereas Twilio is more developer-centric and requires more custom integration for similar features.

competitors.name: Gupshup
competitors.similarity: Both enable businesses to build and deploy conversational bots on WhatsApp and other messaging platforms.
competitors.how_different: Jelou.ai differentiates with integrated, secure financial transactions (payments, KYC, e-signature) and compliance certifications, while Gupshup is more focused on messaging APIs and less on end-to-end transaction workflows.

competitors.name: Aivo
competitors.similarity: Both offer AI conversational platforms for customer service automation, with a strong presence in Latin America.
competitors.how_different: Jelou.ai uniquely enables in-chat payments, KYC, and legal signatures, with a no-code builder and strict data privacy, while Aivo focuses more on customer support automation and less on transactional capabilities.

competitors.name: Yalo
competitors.similarity: Both focus on conversational commerce and automation on WhatsApp and similar channels, targeting enterprise clients.
competitors.how_different: Jelou.ai provides a broader set of in-chat transaction tools (KYC, payments, e-signature) and highlights compliance and security, while Yalo is more commerce-focused and less on regulated workflows.

differentiation.primary: Jelou.ai is the only platform providing secure, no-code AI agent creation with native in-chat payments, KYC, and e-signature on WhatsApp, targeting regulated industries.
differentiation.technical: No-code Brain Studio for agent creation, native integration of payments/KYC/signature directly in WhatsApp (no external links), strict data privacy (no third-party model training or retention), end-to-end encryption, and compliance with ISO 27001 and PCI DSS.
differentiation.business: Focus on regulated industries (banking, health, commerce) with out-of-the-box compliance, rapid deployment, and a marketplace for integrations. Official Meta tech and business partner status.
differentiation.positioning: Positions as the trusted, secure, and compliant AI automation platform for enterprises needing to transact and verify within chat, not just automate conversations.

secret_sauce.core_advantage: Deep, secure integration of financial-grade transactions (payments, KYC, e-signature) within WhatsApp conversations, with a no-code builder and strict compliance.
secret_sauce.defensibility: Combines technical integrations (payments, KYC, signature) with regulatory certifications (ISO 27001, PCI DSS), official Meta partnerships, and a privacy-first architecture (no third-party data retention or model training).
evidence: La única plataforma que necesitas para crear agentes IA. Sin código.
Pagos seguros sin salir de WhatsApp. Sin links externos.
Firma legalmente vinculante sin salir de WhatsApp.
Validamos la identidad de los clientes recopilando, verificando los datos y comprobándolos biométricamente.
Socio tecnológico oficial (Meta tech provider)
Certificación AENOR ISO 27001 en Seguridad de la Información
Prohibimos que los proveedores entrenen modelos con tus datos.
No permitimos que los proveedores de AI almacenen ninguno de tus datos.

competitive_analysis.moat_explanation: Jelou.ai's moat is based on its deep, secure, and compliant integration of transactional workflows within WhatsApp, including regulatory certifications and privacy guarantees. This is defensible in the short-to-medium term due to technical and compliance barriers, but could be challenged by larger platforms or API providers if they prioritize similar integrations and certifications. Official Meta partnerships and a focus on regulated industries strengthen defensibility, but the moat is not insurmountable.

evidence_quotes: Brain Studio La única plataforma que necesitas para crear agentes IA. Sin código.
Voice Agents Crea asistentes de voz inteligentes capaces de vender y atender clientes por tí.
La plataforma para construir agentes AI en Whatsapp.
Agentes IA Diseña, entrena y coordina agentes inteligentes para automatizar tus procesos.
Automatiza llamadas de voz en WhatsApp Business con IA. Jelou Voice AI transforma la experiencia del cliente.
Jelou Brain: mini-apps con IA para operar negocios desde WhatsApp
Ofrece una experiencia de compra conversacional que entiende lo que el cliente realmente quiere.
Conecta con tus clientes en sus canales preferidos. Lanza tus Agentes de IA en WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Web y más con solo unos pocos clics.

In-chat transaction orchestration: Jelou.ai enables secure payments, KYC, and e-signature entirely within WhatsApp and other messaging channels, tightly integrating transactional workflows with conversational AI agents.

Strict data residency and privacy guarantees: Explicit prohibitions on third-party model training and data retention, plus end-to-end encryption for transactional data, exceed standard SaaS AI privacy practices.
